visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit indoor studio or home setting, a middle-aged man wearing a light blue textured flat cap, glasses, and a white t-shirt holds up two smartphone mockups, one orange and one blue. He speaks enthusiastically to the camera, gesturing with the phones while maintaining high facial expression variability. (2) The scene transitions to a retail store environment (Taiwan Mobile). The man compares the orange phone mockup to a small orange metallic camera lens cap he is holding. The background features bright overhead lighting, retail displays, and blurred figures of shoppers. (3) A close-up of a modern smartphone screen displays promotional materials for the iPhone 17 Pro Max. The man is then shown gesturing upwards in the store, with colorful text overlays and stylized cartoon graphics appearing around him to emphasize his speech. (4) A screen recording of the '3cTim哥生活日常' YouTube channel interface is shown, focusing on the live stream and giveaway content. The man is later seen looking at a retail box for a Nintendo Switch 2 inside a glass display case. (5) The man continues his presentation in the store, holding a smartphone showing a flight booking for 'TPE to SFO'. He uses animated hand gestures to explain the giveaway prizes, including flight tickets and eSIM services, while standing near mobile accessory displays. (6) In the final phase, the man stands near the entrance of the retail store, spreading his arms and pointing at the camera. He is surrounded by large text overlays stating the total value of prizes and a cartoon dog graphic holding money, concluding with a call to action.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 你看. [Slogan]: 如何拿到免費的 iPhone 17 Pro. (2) [Subtitle]: 這就是這一次 iPhone 17 Pro 最新款特殊色. [Variety]: 顏色是錯的!. (3) [Subtitle]: 錯在哪 嘿! 顏色太淺了!. [Variety]: 錯在哪. (4) [Subtitle]: 那真正顏色是怎 在這裡 它的橘 才是這個橘呀. [Variety]: 顏色太淺了!. (5) [Subtitle]: 這麼深 可是 這個不是今天的重點. (6) [Subtitle]: 重點是什麼 教你們如何拿到免費的 iPhone 17 Pro. [Variety]: 教你們如何拿到免費的 iPhone 17 Pro. (7) [Subtitle]: 聽說今年 iPhone 17 賣更貴耶!! 沒有關係. [Variety]: 聽說今年 iPhone 17 賣更貴耶!!. (8) [Subtitle]: 先來呢 看我們 9月蘋果發表會直播. [Variety]: 9月和我們一起看 蘋果發表會直播. [Logo]: 3cTim哥生活日常. (9) [Subtitle]: iPhone 17 全系列 就直接抽給你. [Variety]: iPhone 17 全系列. (10) [Subtitle]: 如果我們達到百萬的話呢 iPhone 17 全系列. (11) [Subtitle]: 獎項 x2. [Variety]: 獎項 x2. (12) [Subtitle]: 哇 Switch 2 耶 老闆 我最近在猶豫要不要買. [Variety]: Switch 2. (13) [Subtitle]: 不用買 先來參加我們9月蘋果發表會直播. [Variety]: 參加我們9月蘋果發表會直播. (14) [Subtitle]: 就有機會抽 Switch 2 瑪利歐賽車的同捆包. [Variety]: 瑪利歐賽車的同捆包. (15) [Subtitle]: 誒 老闆 現在暑假一波出國潮 我想出國 但沒錢耶. [Variety]: 抽獎啦!. (16) [Subtitle]: 沒關係 9月份先參加我們蘋果發表會直播 就有機會抽. (17) [Subtitle]: 星宇航空 來回機票!! 日本/舊金山. [Variety]: 星宇航空 日本/舊金山. (18) [Subtitle]: 還送你 eSIM 一年免費 讓你用到飽啊. [Variety]: 包辦你一年份 eSIM 網路!. (19) [Subtitle]: 現在馬上訂閱追蹤我們頻道 到時候還有更多大獎. (20) [Subtitle]: 讓你來抽 總價值超過 40 萬. [Variety]: 總價值超過 40 萬. (21) [Subtitle]: 這次我真的誠意十足 就等你來拿.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, at least 2 blurred passers-by in the background of the retail store.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a blue-grey textured flat cap, black-rimmed glasses, a white t-shirt, and a beaded bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a clean indoor room with neutral walls; moves to a brightly lit Taiwan Mobile retail store with white shelves, digital displays, and branding signage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic male voice (Tim) begins speaking with rapid cadence and bright inflection. An upbeat, major-mode electronic pop background track enters with a prominent drum beat. A sharp 'whoosh' SFX accompanies the first visual transition. (2) Tim engages in a fast-paced dialogue with a slightly deeper off-screen male voice. Digital 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects trigger with every new text graphic appearing on screen. The music maintains a constant high-energy baseline. (3) The acoustic texture remains clean, suggesting a high-quality studio-style audio mix even during the retail store scenes. A 'stinger' SFX emphasizes the mention of the iPhone 17 Pro, followed by Tim's enthusiastic narration about a live giveaway. (4) The off-screen male voice asks short questions about travel, and Tim responds with high arousal, his pitch rising as he lists the rewards like 'Switch 2' and 'STARLUX tickets'. The background music swells slightly in volume during transitions between topics. (5) The vocal intensity peaks during the final call to action. The music continues through to the end of the clip, finishing with a final digital UI sound effect as the closing graphics appear. The overall mix is highly polished with zero noise interference.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Mockup Demo -> Problem -> Solution (Giveaway) -> Detailed Prize List -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy promotional teaser to drive traffic to a live stream event on the creator's YouTube channel. It uses the buzz surrounding 'iPhone 17' mockups to hook the audience, then pivots to announcing a massive giveaway including tech gadgets, flight tickets, and services, emphasizing a total prize value of 400,000 TWD.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of Taiwan Mobile, STARLUX Airlines, and specific prizes being given away as part of a promotional campaign.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Professional editing with synchronized SFX and high-energy delivery tailored for social media engagement.
